name: Tally-ho! Springans
name_jp: タリホー！スプリガンズ！
desc: When you activate this card, you can also detach up to 3 materials from monsters you control; add 1 "Springans" monster from your Deck to your hand, then, if you detached any material at activation, you can Special Summon that many "Springans" monsters from your hand or GY. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Xyz Monster on the field; detach 1 material from it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Tally-ho! Springans" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: When you activate this card, you can also detach up to 3 materials from monsters you control; add 1 "Springans" monster from your Deck to your hand, then, if you detached any material at activation, you can Special Summon that many "Springans" monsters from your hand or GY. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can target 1 Xyz Monster on the field; detach 1 material from it, and if you do, add this card to your hand. You can only use 1 "Tally-ho! Springans" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
